attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-04-00212 — SEQ derived from source CDV-012; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-CARD-04 bucket.

Patient age not explicitly stated in source; inferred as adolescent (~16) from 'patient and parents present', competitive sport, 65 kg, and a maternal cousin who died at 16 — confirm on clinician review.
Patient sex not stated in source; sex_at_birth inferred as male with no strong signal — confirm on clinician review.
Geographic context (RA1_major_city) inferred — not stated in source.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours clinician who examined the patient and measured vitals (BP 115/70, HR 68, SpO2 100%, normal CV exam). Clinician-measured exam/vitals and all cardiac investigations (ECG, stress test, echo) are sealed in 10/11 as physical_sign/investigation_result; only patient-obtainable/observable data (recovered appearance, resting smartwatch HR) placed in 01.objective_data_offered, verified:false.
Presentation layer de-anchored: the source names the suspected diagnosis (CPVT) and gives the answer-key reasoning; 01/02 rewritten as the patient/parent would present before any diagnosis is known.

Baseline tier set to T4 (urgent same-day ED/in-person cardiac assessment) rather than T5: patient has fully recovered and is currently stable, but a lethal inherited arrhythmia cannot be excluded remotely — conservative honest disposition. Recurrence escalates to T5 (000).

No dose synthesised: the source names beta-blocker therapy but gives no dose; beta-blocker is specialist-initiated and paediatric/adolescent dosing is not produced remotely — flagged for in-person specialist review.
Candidate codes only (ICD-10-AM I47.2 is generic ventricular tachycardia; there is no CPVT-specific ICD-10-AM code) — all registered unverified_pending_terminology_receipt.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
